use_cases: Display global distribution data or metrics in dashboard interfaces
Visualize worldwide user locations or market reach for SaaS platforms
Create geographic data presentations for educational content
Show international network connections or server locations
Render animated globe backgrounds for media or news applications
ai_summary: An SVG-based globe visualization component that renders a geometric grid pattern representing a globe or hemispherical view. Features configurable aspect ratios via the fullGlobe prop, responsive design with CSS grid variables, and customizable line colors using HSL theme variables. The component uses pure CSS transforms for positioning without JavaScript-driven animations, making it a lightweight, performant option for displaying global data visualizations in web applications.
